lines.speaker: Romily Weaklax
lines.text: Hello and welcome to my pie shop, how can I help you?

lines.speaker: Romily Weaklax
lines.text: Actually I could, you see I'm running out of stock and I don't have time to bake any more pies. Would you be willing to bake me some pies? I'll pay you well for them.

lines.speaker: Romily Weaklax
lines.text: Great, can you bake me [amount] [pie type] Pies please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got those pies you wanted.

lines.speaker: Romily Weaklax
lines.text: Doesn't look like you have any of the [amount] [pie type] Pies I requested.

lines.speaker: Romily Weaklax
lines.text: Thank you, if you could bring me the other [amount] that'd be great!
